headline: Jim Cramer on Fox Corporation: “I Think That’s Pretty Cheap, Too Cheap”
summary: Fox Corporation (NASDAQ:FOX) is one of the S&P 500 stocks that Jim Cramer shared his take on. Cramer called the company being one of the worst-performing stocks in the S&P 500 an “anomaly.” He said: Next up, the eighth-worst-performing in the S&P last month was Fox. Now, this is an anomaly. It’s down 22.6%. Odd. […]
